steps.title: Identify the input value
steps.content: The variable $x$ represents minutes after the helicopter begins to descend. Since we want the height 4 minutes after descent begins, we need to find $f(4)$.

steps.title: Evaluate the function at x = 4
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 4$ into $f(x) = -35x + 270$:
$$f(4) = -35(4) + 270$$
$$f(4) = -140 + 270$$
$$f(4) = 130$$
The predicted height is 130 feet. A is correct.
